2603.23947.title: Variable-Length Audio Fingerprinting
2603.23947.paper_summary: Audio fingerprinting converts audio to much lower-dimensional representations, allowing distorted recordings to still be recognized as their originals through similar fingerprints. Existing deep learning approaches rigidly fingerprint fixed-length audio segments, thereby neglecting temporal dynamics during segmentation. To address limitations due to this rigidity, we propose Variable-Length Audio FingerPrinting (VLAFP), a novel method that supports variable-length fingerprinting. To the best of our knowledge, VLAFP is the first deep audio fingerprinting model capable of processing audio of variable length, for both training and testing. Our experiments show that VLAFP outperforms existing state-of-the-arts in live audio identification and audio retrieval across three real-world datasets.
2603.23947.paper_summary_zh: 音頻指紋技術將音頻轉換為低維度的表示，允許失真錄音仍然能夠通過相似的指紋被識別為其原始版本。現有的深度學習方法僵化地對固定長度的音頻片段進行指紋識別，從而忽略了分段過程中的時間動態。為了解決由於這種僵化所帶來的限制，我們提出了可變長度音頻指紋技術（Variable-Length Audio FingerPrinting，簡稱VLAFP），這是一種支持可變長度指紋識別的新方法。據我們所知，VLAFP 是第一個能夠處理可變長度音頻的深度音頻指紋模型，適用於訓練和測試。我們的實驗顯示，VLAFP 在三個真實世界數據集中的現場音頻識別和音頻檢索方面超越了現有的最先進技術。
2603.23947.author: Hongjie Chen et.al.
2603.23947.authors: Hongjie Chen, Hanyu Meng, Huimin Zeng, Ryan A. Rossi, Lie Lu, Josh Kimball
